headers.name: Access-Control-Allow-Headers
headers.value: X-Origin, Accept, Authorization, srcUrl, DNT, X-Mx-ReqToken, Keep-Alive, User-Agent, X-Requested-With, If-Modified-Since, Cache-Control, Content-Type, X-Cache-Date, X-Atmosphere-tracking-id, X-Atmosphere-Framework, X-TimeZone-Offset, X-Atmosphere-Transport, test-scope, schema, *

metadata.user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/134.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
